meta.title: Blog For User Interactive
meta.description: Secure bilingual blog platform foundation with Supabase authentication and database setup.

auth.loginDescription: Use your Supabase account to access protected routes and the dashboard foundation.
auth.resetDescription: Request a recovery link to securely reset your password.
auth.updatePasswordDescription: Set a new password for your account after opening the recovery link.
auth.setupMissingDescription: Create a .env.local file and provide the variables below, then restart the development server before trying to sign in again.

errors.missingSupabaseEnv: Supabase environment variables are missing. Complete the local setup and restart the app.
errors.invalidCredentials: The email or password is incorrect.
errors.resetRequestFailed: The recovery email could not be sent. Please try again.
errors.passwordTooShort: Choose a password with at least 8 characters.
errors.passwordMismatch: The password confirmation does not match.
errors.passwordUpdateFailed: The password could not be updated. Please try again.

feedback.resetRequestSent: If the email exists, a recovery link has been sent.

home.title: The bilingual platform foundation is ready for feature work.
home.description: This phase sets up the app shell, locale handling, theme architecture, developer tooling, and Supabase integration points without implementing business workflows yet.
foundationItems: Next.js App Router with TypeScript and strict typing
Tailwind CSS, ESLint, and Prettier configured
Locale-aware routing with browser detection and persistence
Theme provider architecture with token-based CSS variables
Supabase browser and server helpers plus environment templates

dashboard.title: Account dashboard
dashboard.description: This protected page proves the Supabase session flow, profile loading, route guards, and reusable database repositories.

profile.title: Profile details
profile.description: This page loads the authenticated user profile from Supabase through the shared server-side data layer.

admin.title: Administrative overview
admin.description: This route is restricted to the admin role and reads seeded platform settings through the database layer.
